name: Cloudian - Sheep Cloud
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雲魔物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クラウディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>羊雲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シープクラウド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Special Summon 2 "Cloudian Tokens" (Fairy/WATER/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position. These Tokens cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon, except for "Cloudian" monsters.
mnst_eff: If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Special Summon 2 "Cloudian Tokens" (Fairy/WATER/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position. These Tokens cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon, except for "Cloudian" monsters.
